name: Snapmaker U1
_comment: Conservative starter profile for the Snapmaker U1 multi-extruder. Replace with a real OrcaSlicer-exported profile for production accuracy. Build volume from official spec; speeds and accelerations are sane defaults — verify against the printer's recommended values before relying on print time estimates.
machine_start_gcode:
M104 S[first_layer_temperature] ; set extruder temp
M140 S[first_layer_bed_temperature] ; set bed temp
G28 ; home all
G1 Z5 F5000 ; lift
M109 S[first_layer_temperature] ; wait extruder
M190 S[first_layer_bed_temperature] ; wait bed
machine_end_gcode:
M104 S0 ; turn off extruder
M140 S0 ; turn off bed
G91 ; relative
G1 Z10 F600 ; lift
G90 ; absolute
G28 X Y ; park
M84 ; disable motors
